series_metadata.series_description: Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error or duplicated

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Paper copies to be store in the fiscal office for a period of (1) year then transferred offsite to be stored for an additional year then shred. ; Electronic: Electronic copies are stored on the State of Ohio OAKS FIN database indefinitely., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Permanent
